1.sql: SELECT objid, kommunenummer, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

2.sql: SELECT objid, bygningid, representasjonspunkt FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

3.sql: SELECT objid, omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT ST_Envelope(omrade) FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '4204'));

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get buildings in the municipality (filter by kommunenummer from step 1)

3.description: get 200-year storm-flood polygons (stormflo200ar_klimaarna) for later spatial filter

4.description: get flood-area polygons (flomareal) with gjentaksintervall=200 for later spatial filter

5.description: find buildings that intersect 200-year storm-surge areas

6.description: from the buildings intersecting storm-surge, find those that also intersect 200-year flood areas

7.description: collapse to one row per building (group by bygningid and objid)
